title: Uno Totem Reverse card
description: Turns Totem of Undying into UNO Reverse Card. Also unobstructive in first person.
body:
### 📜 Features
- UNO Reverse Card replace Totem of Undying.
- Totem name -> UNO Reverse Card
- Totem advancement -> Use a UNO Reverse Card to cheat death
- Totem's first person model is unobstructive.
- Also Compatible with Portuguese 🇧🇷

### 🗨️ Contact
> My Discord DM -> caiosm1
